_comment: Hybrid sprite manifest - maps IDs to external sprite sheet paths. HybridSpriteLoader reads from 'sheets' key.

rogue_sdxl.generator: SDXL + jrpg_pixel_style LoRA (v3, with artist rogue) + IP-Adapter (artist ref)

rogue_artist.source: artist (Rogue Base sprite.png from Google Drive)

iron_sword.notes: Separated weapon sprites for fighter iron sword. Compose over body animations.

slash.notes: Slash arc with trail effect. Frames: windup, peak, follow-through.

bronze_sword.notes: Bronze sword weapon sprites for early-game fighter.

flame_sword.notes: Flame sword weapon sprites with fire visual effects.

ice_blade.notes: Ice blade weapon sprites with frost visual effects.
